items.name: gdi_pal
items.doc: GDI palette abstraction and color management utilities for graphics operations.

items.name: find_window_by_partial_title
items.doc: Finds the first visible window whose title contains `partial` (case-insensitive).

items.name: get_window_rect
items.signature: pub fn get_window_rect(hwnd: u64) -> Result<(i32, i32, i32, i32), AppError>
items.doc: Returns the screen rect (left, top, right, bottom) for `hwnd`.
